## Install Type

- [ ] Community fork
- [ ] Owner install
- [ ] Agency install
- [ ] Partner implementation

## Surfaces

- OS workspace:
- Portal URL:
- Runtime mode: demo-memory / Postgres

## Gates

- [ ] Property facts approved
- [ ] Portal validates
- [ ] Portal builds
- [ ] `db/schema.sql` applied
- [ ] `db/rls.sql` applied
- [ ] `PROPERTY_OS_ORG_ID` seeded
- [ ] `/admin/runtime` reviewed
- [ ] Owner approval workflow tested

## Help Needed

Use sanitized summaries only.
